case=one_step_synthetic
command=one_step
depvar=y
covars=x1 x2
options=generated(x1)
tol_coef=0.001
tol_vcov=0.01
n=2000
k=3
vmli_version=1.4.0
note=One-step MLE on a binary AI/ML-generated regressor; true fpr=fnr=0.10, heteroskedastic Gaussian errors (sigma0=0.5, sigma1=0.8). MLE tolerance reflects optimizer differences between JAX-LBFGS and Mata-BFGS.
